reports.title: Report Issue
reports.description: Report road issues, potholes, and hazards

sos.title: Emergency SOS
sos.description: Get immediate help in case of emergency

home.subtitle: Raksha AI unifies emergency response, AI road-issue detection, and predictive accident analytics into one platform built for Indian roads.
home.problemDescription: Every year, lakhs of lives are affected by preventable road accidents. Delayed response, poor infrastructure monitoring, and lack of real-time data are the three pillars of this crisis. Raksha AI addresses all three.
home.ctaDescription: Report a road hazard, share a hotspot, or activate emergency assistance. Every action counts.
home.footer: Built for India · Road Safety Ecosystem · 2024

features.sosDesc: One-tap emergency dispatch with live GPS, nearby hospitals, and simulated ambulance ETA.
features.roadDesc: AI-powered pothole and damage detection from uploaded images. Confidence-scored classification.
features.dashboardDesc: Accident hotspot maps, issue heatmaps, safety analytics and real-time zone insights.
features.riskDesc: ML-based zone risk prediction from time-of-day, conditions, and historical patterns.
features.legalDesc: Traffic laws, fines, and location-aware rule awareness for Indian roads.

problemStats.fatalities: Road accident fatalities annually in India, one of the highest globally.
problemStats.delayed: Deaths occur due to delayed emergency response after the accident.
problemStats.roadConditions: Accidents attributed to poor road conditions, potholes and unmarked hazards.
problemStats.responseSaved: Average time saved per emergency response with AI-assisted dispatch routing.

dashboardLive.connectMaps: Connect Google Maps API to enable

reportIssuePage.title: Report Issue
reportIssuePage.subtitle: Upload a road image for AI-powered issue detection
reportIssuePage.uploadSubtitle: Drag and drop your image or browse your device to start AI detection.
reportIssuePage.roadPlaceholder: e.g. NH-48, KM 14 near Mahipalpur flyover
reportIssuePage.notesPlaceholder: Describe the issue, how long it has been there, danger level...
reportIssuePage.submittedMessage: Your road issue has been logged and will be verified by our team. Thank you for helping make Indian roads safer.

simulated.pothole: Deep pothole detected with high confidence. Estimated diameter 40-60cm. Immediate repair recommended.
simulated.damage: Road surface cracking and subsidence detected. Multiple fracture lines visible.
simulated.water: Standing water on road surface detected. Depth estimated above 10cm based on visual cues.
simulated.surface: General road surface wear detected. No immediate danger but maintenance required.

uploader.invalidImage: Please select a valid image file.
uploader.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP and other common image formats.
uploader.chooseHint: or click to choose a file from your device

detector.analyzingDescription: Our AI pipeline is checking the image for road damage patterns.
detector.emptyDescription: Upload an image to get an AI-based road issue assessment.
detector.fallbackDescription: The image has been analyzed and classified using the current road safety model.

riskPage.title: Risk Alerts
riskPage.subtitle: ML-based accident risk prediction for your route
riskPage.predictorHelp: Set conditions. Model returns zone risk score.

advice.critical: Avoid this zone if possible. High accident probability detected.
advice.high: Drive with extreme caution. Multiple risk factors active.
advice.low: Zone appears safe. Standard driving precautions apply.

sosPage.title: Emergency SOS
sosPage.subtitle: One-tap emergency alert with live location dispatch
sosPage.helper: Tap SOS to send your location to emergency services and emergency contacts instantly.

steps.capture: Your GPS coordinates are captured and sent to the backend.
steps.hospitals: Nearest hospitals and emergency units are identified.
steps.ambulance: Ambulance dispatch is triggered with estimated arrival time.
steps.sms: Your emergency contacts receive an SMS with your location.

legalPage.title: Legal Info
legalPage.subtitle: Traffic laws and fines under Indian Motor Vehicles Act 2019
legalPage.prototype: This is a static reference. Location-based rule personalisation is planned for a future release. Always verify with official MORTH sources.
legalPage.futureScopeText: Location-based rule personalisation will show state-specific speed limits, city-level restrictions, and time-sensitive rules based on GPS.

speeding.title: Over-speeding
speeding.desc: Driving above prescribed speed limits on highways, urban roads, or school zones.

dangerous.title: Dangerous Driving
dangerous.desc: Driving in a manner that endangers life or property of others. Includes racing and rash driving.

dui.title: Drunken Driving (DUI)
dui.desc: Driving with blood alcohol content exceeding 30mg/100ml of blood.

seatbelt.title: Seatbelt Violation
seatbelt.desc: Driver or front-seat passenger not wearing seatbelt while vehicle is in motion.

helmet.title: Helmet Not Worn
helmet.desc: Two-wheeler rider or pillion not wearing an ISI-certified helmet.

redLight.title: Jumping Red Light
redLight.desc: Proceeding past a red traffic signal without stopping at the designated stop line.

mobile.title: Mobile Phone Use While Driving
mobile.desc: Using a handheld mobile phone for talking, texting, or any purpose while driving.

wrongSide.title: Wrong-side Driving
wrongSide.desc: Driving on the incorrect side of the road or against traffic flow on a one-way street.

overloading.title: Vehicle Overloading
overloading.desc: Carrying passengers or cargo beyond the registered capacity of the vehicle.

insurance.title: Driving Without Insurance
insurance.desc: Operating a motor vehicle on a public road without valid third-party insurance.

licence.title: Driving Without Licence
licence.desc: Operating a motor vehicle without a valid driving licence or a learner's licence.

racing.title: Unauthorised Racing / Trials
racing.desc: Participating in any speed contest or trial on a public road without prior written government permission.

sosModal.geoNotSupported: Geolocation not supported — using default location.
sosModal.geoFailed: Could not access GPS — using approximate location.

mapUi.noApiKey: No Google Maps API key provided.

locationErrors.denied: Location access denied. Please enable GPS in your browser settings.
locationErrors.unavailable: Position unavailable. Check your GPS signal.
